releases.label: DR1
releases.summary: LoTSS first full-quality public data release — 424 deg2 (2% of eventual coverage) in the HETDEX Spring Field, mapped at 120-168 MHz with a fully automated direction-dependent calibration and imaging pipeline; 325,694 sources detected at >=5x noise, median sensitivity 71 uJy/beam at 144 MHz, 90% point-source completeness at 0.45 mJy

releases.label: DR2
releases.summary: LoTSS second data release — 120-168 MHz images covering 27% of the northern sky in two regions of 4,178 and 1,457 deg2, derived from 3,451 h (7.6 PB) of LOFAR High Band Antenna data; catalogue of 4,396,228 radio sources, 6 arcsec resolution Stokes I maps with median rms sensitivity 83 uJy/beam; accompanied by radio-optical crossmatch, photo-z, and classification value-added catalogues (combined release v1.1)
